title: The Incredible Adventures of Van Helsing: Final Cut

notes: So far, it just runs. It installed, cinematic played, created an account, logged in, created a character, started a game, played for a little bit. No graphical problems, no glitches of any kind.
title: The Incredible Adventures of Van Helsing: Final Cut

notes: There is a single spot at the very beginning of the game where it crashes something like 80% of the time. Otherwise, no tweaks needed and no observable faults. If not for that crash (which I think might be present on Windows even) it would be Platinum.
title: The Incredible Adventures of Van Helsing: Final Cut

notes: The game has a tendency to crash when I use the teleport feature, which is annoying and leads to a lot of backtrack. Otherwise playable
title: The Incredible Adventures of Van Helsing: Final Cut

notes: The game with proton 4.2-9 was tested. In terms of performance goes to 30 frames. The gameplay and the sound go very well. No adjustments were made.
title: The Incredible Adventures of Van Helsing: Final Cut

notes: I'm not sure what others are doing, but I get 1-15 FPS and studders like nobody's business. Completely unplayable. Even on the lowest settings. I have it set to ultra on windows on the same machine and I get 90 FPS. Tries with esync enabled and disabled, gamemode, and with d3d11 disabled.
title: The Incredible Adventures of Van Helsing: Final Cut
